next_steps: Send CSF and serum for Angiostrongylus cantonensis-specific PCR
Send CSF and serum for Gnathostoma spinigerum serology
Perform contrast-enhanced MRI of the brain and entire spine
Send CSF for Mycobacterium tuberculosis PCR and fungal culture
Request specialized infectious disease consultation for consideration of anthelmintic therapy
Maintain empirical broad-spectrum coverage for bacterial meningitis and acyclovir until viral studies return
